name: Scourge
description: Blast targets with corrosive plasma projectiles, or toss the scepter to inflict an energy field upon nearby enemies that amplifies their brain waves to attract bullets.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Blast targets with corrosive plasma projectiles, or toss the scepter to inflict an energy field upon nearby enemies that amplifies their brain waves to attract bullets.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 31.1.0: Echoes of War
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Javlok projectiles flying side-on to the direction of travel when the Renuntio Speargun Skin is equipped. Also fixes the same scenario for the Scourge/Scourge Prime with the Carcinus Speargun Skin equipped.

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a Dedicated Server script error in Conclave when using the Scourge.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Scourge projectile trail FX appearing distorted.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Scourge's throw sounds playing when Modding.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Scourge appearing to be rotated incorrectly when viewed on a surface

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ash’s Blade Storm not removing the temporary melee weapon given to Ash if the only weapon he has is a Speargun (Javlok, Scourge, etc) and he's currently thrown the Speargun out when activating Blade Storm.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Scourge not being affected by Adhesive Blast and Firestorm Mods.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.4.0
patchlogs.changes:
Removed Corrosive radial AoE from Scourge in Conclave.
Scourge's bullet attractor now lasts 3 seconds in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Scourge not being affected by Heavy Calibers accuracy reduction. 
Fixed the Scourge damaging or killing players when picking it up while paused in Limbo’s Rift before it hits the ground.
Fixed the Scourge and Cycron Status lasting longer for the Host.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.additions: Harrow’s signature Primary weapon, the Scourge is a Corrosive spear gun that shoots wave projectiles with high Punch Through and guaranteed Status Effects. Thrown spears attach a bullet attractor to the heads of all enemies within 14 meters, and continues to pulse every 7 seconds and attaches bullet attractors for 3 seconds wherever it has landed.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Virulent Scourge Mod dropping fully-ranked and in packs of 10 from Project Undermine Missions.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Tactical Alert: Black Seed Scourge Reward PSA: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/469963-psa-tactical-alert-bss-core-rewards
